subject: (no subject)
body: when you remember, visualize ite,  standing and waiting , thinking they might not come.. who were you angry at. -think hard- the fact that your parents needed to survive, you would not have understood unemotionally. think hard.. when you decided which one, accept that anger, because they are your parents does not mean they are immune.. now, write that one a letter telling them , how you really felt, don't leave out any of the details, make it as harsh as you like, when you finish,,- rip it up, and throw it and the anger away.  try it..
